title: --help

traditional.reason: The claimed ticket has title '--help', an empty body, and no scientific target or reported number to reproduce.

scientific_summary: The claimed queue item is not a scientific study. It is a rescued malformed command artifact with title '--help' and an empty body. A raw ROOT preflight confirmed that the expected local data are readable, but there is no ticket-specific reported number, target observable, baseline, ML label, or run-held-out metric to reproduce or benchmark. The only defensible conclusion is queue hygiene: close the malformed ticket rather than release it to another worker.
